headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -93.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 98% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 113 quotes including 88 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 51.0 sits in the lower-middle range of the 77-day period but represents a notable jump from yesterday's 23.7.

• Optimism remains deeply negative at -42.8, while fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
